title: triceras lividum
intro: Triceras lividum, commonly known as the "wild lettuce" or "lance leaf lettuce", is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Triceras lividum include its ability to relieve insomnia, anxiety, and pain, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be used in capsule or powder form as a dietary supplement.
